title: Europa, nu da înapoi!
summary: Francis Fukuyama urges European allies not to capitulate to Donald Trump's tariff threats over Greenland, arguing that appeasement only emboldens him. He points out that countries like China, India, and Brazil successfully resisted Trump's pressure in 2025, and calls on Europe to unite and retaliate rather than offer concessions.
talking_points: Trump's tariff threats against European countries over Greenland are serious and escalating, not mere posturing
Appeasement strategy through concessions and flattery has failed — Trump despises weakness
Countries that stood up to Trump in 2025 (China, India, Brazil) fared well and gained domestic support
Europe, equal to the US in population and wealth, should adopt a unified retaliatory stance
Trump does not represent all of America — most Americans oppose his policies and will likely vote against Republicans in midterms
author: Francis Fukuyama
